mapper.sql: id, banner_name, image_url, link_url, sort, status, remark, start_time, end_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM banner WHERE 1=1 AND banner_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') AND status = #{status} ORDER BY sort ASC
SELECT FROM banner ORDER BY sort ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO banner (banner_name, image_url, link_url, sort, status, remark, start_time, end_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{bannerName}, #{imageUrl}, #{linkUrl}, #{sort}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE banner SET banner_name=#{bannerName}, image_url=#{imageUrl}, link_url=#{linkUrl}, sort=#{sort}, status=#{status}, remark=#{remark}, start_time=#{startTime}, end_time=#{endTime}, update_time=#{updateTime} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM banner WHERE id IN #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE banner SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM banner WHERE status = 1 AND NOW() BETWEEN start_time AND end_time ORDER BY sort ASC
